<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Builder\InvocationMocker; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Rule\InvocationOrder; /** * @method InvocationMocker method($constraint) * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ interface MockObject extends Stub { public function expects(InvocationOrder $invocationRule): InvocationMocker; }
